specific_location: Willow Run at intersection with Mid Rd. in sw. Colorado Springs
description: A medium-sized woodpecker with distinctive plumage: red crown patch separated from white forehead by band of black; white of forehead continuing posteriorily between black around and under eye and then isolating black on chin/throat; black around eye and on auriculars extending around nape and down neck and onto and across chest, with bottom edge of black on chest extending in variable streaking; underparts otherwise off white; white basal-primary patch on black wingsBehaviors: perched and calling from tree, then clinging to trunkCall: distinctive, gravelly, somewhat rattling calls that I find otherwise undescribablePlumage: unknown
